subcodes.title: God Is the Great Compassionate Physician Who Alone Gives True Healing: Words spoken on 1911-10-19 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: All true healing comes from God! There are two causes for sickness, one is material, the other spiritual... If the heavenly benediction be upon us while we are being healed
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @light and darkness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as divine physician
